analysis_summary.main_task_improved: Identify stable inorganic materials suitable as high-voltage protective barrier coatings near power lines. The materials should have an energy_above_hull between 0.0 and 0.05 eV/atom, a band_gap between 3.0 and 20.0 eV, and a density between 3.0 and 10.0 g/cm³, excluding toxic elements such as Pb, Cd, and Hg. Include plotting in the workflow.
limitations: Summary uses only retrieved fields (band_gap, energy_above_hull, density).
No thermal transport, melting point, oxidation kinetics, toxicity, or mechanical validation included.

final_conclusion: Retrieved 100 materials. Energy above hull values are concentrated at stable or near-stable levels. Band gaps are predominantly wide. Densities mostly fall within the requested range.
